linting.notes: No linting configuration found. This is a simple Jekyll static site with no linters configured.

testing.notes: No test suite exists. This is a static redirect site. The only validation is whether the Jekyll site builds successfully without errors.

gating_checks.name: test
gating_checks.command: bundle install && bundle exec jekyll build -d test

ci.notes: GitLab CI has two stages: 'test' (runs on all non-master branches) validates the site builds, and 'pages' (runs on master only) deploys to GitLab Pages. The test stage is the gating check - it ensures the Jekyll site can be built without errors.

build.notes: Standard Jekyll static site build. Uses Ruby 2.3.7 with Jekyll 3.8.5 and jekyll-redirect-from plugin.

conventions.notes: This is a static site repository with minimal code. No coding conventions beyond standard Jekyll project structure (_layouts, _sass, css directories).

test_commands.notes: Build succeeded. Site built in 0.089 seconds without errors.

container_recipe.notes: No system dependencies needed beyond what's in the ruby:2.3 base image. The build is fast (<1 second). The JEKYLL_ENV variable is set in CI but not required for basic validation.
